title: An Alternative Homemade Plastic - PVA and Borax
description: I thought this was pretty interesting so I thought I would share it with you. A possible construction material for engines? or maybe be just as a modelling material for the fun of it? It's simple stuff - just PVA and borax in slution with a filler and a plasticiser. I guess a little playing around with this material would yield some interesting results
